title: Black Axolotl
description: A simple resource pack that replaces the standard wild axolotl model with a black one
body:
# **Black Axolotl**
![Black Axolotl](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e6b1bdb2471a049bdc2e9a4895b7f22dcc5fb359.png)
A simple resource pack that replaces the standard wild axolotl model with a black one

It also allows you to see which axolotl is sitting in the bucket

## DEPENDENCIES
**required Optifine**

![required Optifine](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2aab3451064f8687a12c58fcd178abbc0051513f.png)

![Texture](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/82b45a73d5c636b3bf67c4bcaf4f4e998e6d26d7.png)
